detailed_description: This video showcases a 3D animated model of a man's head, dynamically illustrating the progression and various stages of male pattern baldness. The model rotates slowly, allowing viewers to observe a receding hairline and thinning hair at the crown from multiple angles. The animation highlights how hair loss affects different areas of the scalp, providing a comprehensive visual representation of the condition. It acts as a clear visual explanation of the 'problem state' of hair loss.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment serves as the Semantic Core by comprehensively demonstrating the 'Problem_State' of male pattern baldness. The continuous rotation and subtle shifts in hair density and recession effectively illustrate a 'Result_Transformation' or 'Before_After' view of different stages of hair loss from various angles on a 3D model. There is no 'setup' or 'dead air'; the visual information is continuously presented, making the full duration the most impactful demonstration of the condition.
